name: the handoff references the Consumer Compatibility Contract and tells GCTP to gate floors by epoch
command: grep -q 'consumer-compatibility-contract.md' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q 'field-semantics.json' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -qi 'by epoch' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && echo consumer-compat-referenced 1>&2
